title: toona hexandra var. parviflora
intro: Toona hexandra var. parviflora, also known as the 'Small-flowered Toona', is a variety of the Toona hexandra tree, a plant native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Toona hexandra var. parviflora include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Toona hexandra var. parviflora include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin infections.
